items.title: Strengthening Passenger Facilitation in Indian Aviation
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Civil Aviation Strengthening Passenger Facilitation in Indian Aviation Posted On: 18 MAR 2026 8:56AM by PIB Delhi India has emerged as the third-largest domestic aviation market globally, with air travel becoming increasingly accessible and inclusive under the UDAN scheme. items.title: Keel laying of two Next Generation Offshore Patrol Vessels for ICG
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Defence Keel laying of two Next Generation Offshore Patrol Vessels for ICG Posted On: 18 MAR 2026 2:15PM by PIB Delhi The keel laying ceremony of Yard 16402 & 16403, the second and third ship of six Next Generation Offshore Patrol Vessels (OPVs), was held at M/s YMPL, Ratnagiri on March 17, 2026.
